overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy traversing a snowy mountain landscape with sci-fi crystalline formations, meeting an NPC companion, and approaching a tribal settlement built into the mountainside.

events.description: enters narrow rocky canyon passage with crystalline formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward the canyon entrance

entered.detail: snow-covered evergreen trees lining the mountain path
large snow-dusted rock formation marking the canyon entrance
iridescent purple and teal crystalline growths on rock faces
deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open snowy mountain forest with scattered pine trees, approaching a narrow canyon entrance marked by rocky outcrops and colorful crystalline formations.

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into open mountain ridge
catches up to NPC companion walking ahead on the ridge

agents.ego_description: emerging from the canyon and approaching an NPC warrior on the mountain ridge

notable_agents.action: warrior walking ahead on the path, waiting for the player to catch up

entered.detail: distant wooden tribal structures built into the mountainside
expansive view of snow-covered mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: Exiting the crystalline canyon, the scene opens to a wide mountain ridge with distant tribal settlements visible. The character catches up to an NPC warrior walking ahead, and they proceed together along the snowy path.

events.description: NPC companion moves ahead and exits frame, player continues alone

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the NPC warrior past wooden tribal platforms and scaffolding

notable_agents.action: warrior walking parallel to player before moving ahead

entered.detail: elevated wooden platforms with tribal decorations built into the cliffside
steep snow-covered cliff dropping off to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the exposed mountain ridge with wooden tribal structures visible on the right. The NPC companion walks alongside briefly before moving ahead and exiting the frame, leaving the player to continue alone along the cliffside path.

agents.ego_description: descending slightly toward the tribal settlement, passing wooden walkways and fortifications

entered.detail: tribal tent structures with fabric coverings and wooden frames
wooden defensive walls and barriers along the settlement edge
large boulders covered in snow lining the path

segments.scene_description: The final stretch approaches the tribal settlement directly, with wooden fortifications and tents now prominent on the right. The path winds through snow-covered boulders and dry vegetation as the character continues toward the settlement entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a secluded snowy forest through a crystalline canyon and onto an exposed mountain ridge leading toward a tribal settlement. It begins with the character traversing a pine-filled mountain landscape, moving steadily toward a narrow canyon entrance defined by rocky outcrops and vibrant crystalline formations. As the camera exits the canyon, the view expands across a wide ridge where the character catches up to an NPC warrior, and the two proceed together along a snowy path toward distant structures. The scene then shifts as they walk past wooden tribal buildings on the right, with the companion eventually moving ahead and exiting the frame to leave the character alone on the cliffside. Finally, the path winds through snow-covered boulders and dry vegetation, bringing the character directly toward the prominent wooden fortifications and tents of the settlement entrance.
